title: Internet – What Is It?
subtitle: Learning Internet Basics Through Story and Activities
overview: Students learn what the Internet is through a simple story, understand how people use it to learn, watch videos, communicate, and explore information safely.

images._note: Add classroom images showing internet usage and learning activities.

keyTopics: Internet helps us watch educational videos

story.title: Aarav Learns About the Internet
story.content: One day Aarav wanted to learn how volcanoes work. His teacher suggested using the Internet. Aarav opened his computer and searched for volcano videos. He watched educational videos, learned new facts, and even talked with friends about what he discovered. Aarav understood that the Internet is a big network that helps people learn, watch, communicate, and explore information from around the world.

youtubeVideos.title: What Is the Internet for Kids

activity.title: Internet Uses Discussion
steps: Think about how you use the Internet
Write three ways the Internet helps you

quiz.q: What does the Internet help us do?
quiz.explanation: The Internet helps us learn, watch, and communicate.

quiz.q: Which device can connect to the Internet?
quiz.explanation: Many digital devices can connect to the Internet.
